channel.title: SerialCard on The IMSAI Gang
channel.description: Recent content in SerialCard on The IMSAI Gang

item.title: New SIO Compatable Serial Card
item.description: Update 2019-April-22: This totally did not work out the way I intended to. This post is here to document the process of how NOT to design a I/O port card with MCU on the S100 Bus. Please read the post about debuggin the original serial card if you are curious about how our USART works. (or a potential post about the repair. Long story short, we got the orignal serial card working after spending a crap load of effort on debugging the 72MHz ARM Processor not being “fast engough” to catch the OUT data.
